prompt: Photorealistic editorial image for a health-care crisis article about Ukraine. Show a damaged but functioning hospital corridor or emergency medical setting under winter pressure, with clinicians and emergency equipment visible. Emphasize health-system strain, resilience, and humanitarian context. No text, no logos, no flags as the main subject, natural reportage style.

Photorealistic editorial image for an article about Ukraine reconstruction needs. Show urban rebuilding, infrastructure repair planning, construction equipment, and damaged residential or transport infrastructure in a realistic documentary style. No text overlays, no logos, no flags as the main subject.

Photorealistic editorial image for a Ukraine support package article. Show a realistic mix of humanitarian supplies, official briefing context, and reconstruction activity without turning the image into a poster. No text, no logos, no flags as the main subject, natural light, reportage style.

Photorealistic editorial image for a NATO support article about Ukraine. Show a serious institutional meeting or international coordination setting with a diplomatic and defense-support atmosphere. Keep it realistic, modern, and documentary. No text overlays, no logos, no flags as the main subject.

Photorealistic editorial image for an EU diplomacy article about support for Ukraine. Show senior officials arriving or meeting in a secure institutional setting with Kyiv context, winter atmosphere, and diplomatic seriousness. No text, no logos, no flags as the main subject.

Photorealistic editorial image for an energy-support article about Ukraine. Show damaged energy infrastructure, repair work, electrical equipment, and cold-weather civilian context in a realistic documentary style. No text overlays, no logos, no flags as the main subject.

Photorealistic editorial image for a humanitarian health appeal article. Show medical response, supplies, primary health care, and civilian access-to-care context in Ukraine. Keep the image human-centered and realistic. No text, no logos, no flags as the main subject.

Photorealistic editorial image for an air-defence support article about Ukraine. Show modern air-defence or missile-defense support in a restrained documentary style, with infrastructure protection context rather than propaganda. No text overlays, no logos, no flags as the main subject.
